messages: "Stand up straight with your shoulders back." — Jordan Peterson
"Treat yourself like someone you are responsible for helping." — Jordan Peterson
"Make friends with people who want the best for you." — Jordan Peterson
"Compare yourself to who you were yesterday, not to who someone else is today." — Jordan Peterson
"Do not let your children do anything that makes you dislike them." — Jordan Peterson
"Set your house in perfect order before you criticize the world." — Jordan Peterson
"Pursue what is meaningful (not what is expedient)." — Jordan Peterson
"Tell the truth — or, at least, don't lie." — Jordan Peterson
"Assume that the person you are listening to might know something you don't." — Jordan Peterson
"Be precise in your speech." — Jordan Peterson
"Do not bother children when they are skateboarding." — Jordan Peterson
"Pet a cat when you encounter one on the street." — Jordan Peterson
"Do not carelessly denigrate social institutions and creative achievement." — Jordan Peterson
"Imagine who you could be, and then aim single-mindedly at that." — Jordan Peterson
"Do not hide unwanted things in the fog." — Jordan Peterson
"Notice that opportunity lurks where responsibility has been abdicated." — Jordan Peterson
"Do not do what you hate." — Jordan Peterson
"Abandon ideology." — Jordan Peterson
"Work as hard as you possibly can on at least one thing and see what happens." — Jordan Peterson
"Try to make one room in your home as beautiful as possible." — Jordan Peterson
"If old memories still upset you, write them down carefully and completely." — Jordan Peterson
"Plan and work diligently to maintain the romance in your relationship." — Jordan Peterson
"Do not allow yourself to become resentful, deceitful, or arrogant." — Jordan Peterson
"Be grateful in spite of your suffering." — Jordan Peterson
"You deserve a happy life."
"Heaven gave me talents; they must serve a purpose." — Li Bai
"A time will come to cleave the waves and set sail for the vast sea." — Li Bai
"Life is not about waiting for the storm to pass, but learning to dance in the rain." — Vivian Greene
"Believe in yourself — you are stronger than you think."
"Every fall is so you can stand up stronger."
"Your existence itself is valuable."
"Don't fear going slow; fear stopping."
"Today's effort is tomorrow's confidence."
"You are far more capable than you believe."
"Difficulty is the ladder of growth."
"Keep your passion and journey toward distant horizons."
"You deserve all that is good."
"The stars do not ask who hurries; time rewards those who persevere."
"Be your own sun; you need no borrowed light."
"No step in life is wasted; every one counts."
"Your potential is limitless — do not limit yourself."
"Allow yourself to rest, but do not give up."
"You are becoming the person you want to be."
"Slow and steady wins the race."
"Every attempt is worth being proud of."
"Your feelings matter, and your voice deserves to be heard."
"You need not be perfect — only authentic."
"You are already doing well."
"Tomorrow is a new day."
"Time will see your effort."
"Believe in yourself — anything is possible."
"You deserve to be loved, and to love yourself."
"Keep going — good things are on the way."
"A man is not made for defeat." — Ernest Hemingway (The Old Man and the Sea)
"A man can be destroyed but not defeated." — Ernest Hemingway (The Old Man and the Sea)
"If winter comes, can spring be far behind?" — Percy Bysshe Shelley
"Hope is a good thing, maybe the best of things, and no good thing ever dies." — The Shawshank Redemption
"Some birds are not meant to be caged; every feather shines with the light of freedom." — The Shawshank Redemption
"Life consists in struggle." — Romain Rolland
"There is only one heroism in the world: to see the world as it is and to love it." — Romain Rolland
"You don't need to be great to start, but you need to start to be great."
"Every day you do not dance is a day wasted." — Friedrich Nietzsche
"What does not kill me makes me stronger." — Friedrich Nietzsche
"Become who you are." — Friedrich Nietzsche
"Your worth does not depend on others' opinions."
"Courage is not the absence of fear, but acting despite it."
"You have the power to change yourself."
"Treat yourself as kindly as you would someone you love most."
"Your story has only just begun."
"Do not let others define what is possible for you."
"Small steps forward are still forward."
"You deserve peace and joy."
"Let go of perfectionism and embrace progress."
"Your effort will not be in vain."
"Every breath is a fresh start."
"You are better than yesterday."
"Allow yourself to be imperfect, but never stop growing."
"Your inner strength is greater than you imagine."
"Trust the process; trust time."
"You are your own best friend."
"Today, choose to be gentle with yourself."
"Pride brings loss; humility brings gain." — Book of Documents
"As heaven moves with vigor, the noble person strives unceasingly." — Book of Changes (I Ching)
"As earth is receptive, the noble person bears the world with virtue." — Book of Changes (I Ching)
"Without accumulating small steps, one cannot reach a thousand li." — Xunzi
"Without gathering small streams, there can be no rivers or seas." — Xunzi
"Perseverance can carve even metal and stone." — Xunzi
"A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step." — Laozi
"To conquer others takes strength; to conquer yourself is true power." — Laozi
"To know others is wisdom; to know yourself is enlightenment." — Laozi
"You owe no one proof of your worth."
"Your pace is the right pace."
"Rest is not laziness — it is necessary recharging."
"Your feelings are real and they matter."
"Every act of persistence is a promise to yourself."
"You deserve the life you want."
"Be patient — flowers need time to bloom."
"You have already come a long way."
"Your presence makes the world better."
"Do what is right, not what is easy."
"Your kindness needs boundaries."
"Boundaries are where self-love begins."
"Saying no is also a skill."
"Your time is precious — do not waste it on the wrong people or things."
"Put your own needs first."
"You do not need to please everyone."
"The real you is already enough."
"Accept all of yourself, including your imperfections."
"Your worth needs no external validation."
"Inner strength matters more than outward approval."
"Today, live for yourself."
"Read ten thousand books, and writing flows like divine inspiration." — Du Fu
"I shall ascend the highest peak and look down on all lesser mountains." — Du Fu
"Beside a sunken boat, a thousand sails pass; before a sick tree, ten thousand thrive in spring." — Liu Yuxi
"Winding mountains and rivers — then willows shade and flowers bloom in another village." — Lu You
"Book learning alone feels shallow; true knowledge comes from doing." — Lu You
"A sharp sword is forged through grinding; plum blossoms gain their fragrance from bitter cold." — Admonitions for the World
"Without bone-chilling cold, how could plum blossoms fill the air with fragrance?" — Huangbo Xiyun
"To see a thousand miles further, climb one story higher." — Wang Zhihuan
"A true friend at heart makes distance feel like next door." — Wang Bo
"Fear not the road ahead without companions — who in the world does not know you?" — Gao Shi
"Heaven gave me talents that must serve a purpose; gold spent will return again." — Li Bai
"Laughing skyward as I go out the door — we are not meant to wither in the weeds." — Li Bai
"Your dreams deserve to be taken seriously."
"Do not let small fears block big dreams."
"Your passion is a precious treasure."
"Stay curious; keep exploring."
"Learning is a lifelong pursuit."
"Growth matters more than success."
"Your progress deserves celebration."
"Do not compare yourself to your past self in judgment."
"Focus on the present — it is the best investment."
"Your attention is your most precious resource."
"Choose to put your energy into what matters."
"Less is more."
"Quality matters more than quantity."
"Depth matters more than breadth."
"Your focus is a superpower."
"Do one thing at a time."
"Slow down and feel the process."
"Be the first to worry about the world's troubles and the last to enjoy its joys." — Fan Zhongyan
"Do not rejoice in external gain or grieve over personal loss." — Fan Zhongyan
"Since ancient times, who has not died? Leave a loyal heart to shine through history." — Wen Tianxiang
"I fear not being ground to dust — I seek to leave purity in this world." — Yu Qian
"If it serves the nation, I would face life and death — how could I flee fortune or misfortune?" — Lin Zexu
"The sea accepts all rivers; greatness comes from tolerance." — Lin Zexu
"A cliff stands a thousand ren high; without desire, one is unyielding." — Lin Zexu
"To establish the heart of heaven and earth, secure the destiny of the people, continue the lost learning of sages, and open peace for all generations." — Zhang Zai
"The road ahead is long and arduous; I will search high and low without ceasing." — Qu Yuan
"For what my heart holds dear, though I die nine times, I would not regret it." — Qu Yuan
"Your persistence will lead to something beautiful."
"Do not give up — the turning point may be a second away."
"After darkness comes dawn."
"Your resilience exceeds your imagination."
"Hardship is temporary; growth is permanent."
"Every challenge is an opportunity."
"You adapt well."
"Change is the catalyst for growth."
"Embrace uncertainty."
"Flexibility is stronger than stubbornness."
"Learn to live with imperfection."
"Life needs not perfection — only authenticity."
"Your uniqueness is your advantage."
"Do not imitate others; be your best self."
"Your perspective is one of a kind."
"The world needs your voice."
"Your contribution matters."
"Do not underestimate your influence."
"Small acts of kindness can change the world."
"Your existence itself is meaningful."
"To know what you know and know what you do not know — that is wisdom." — Confucius
"When three walk together, one of them can be my teacher." — Confucius
"To learn and practice from time to time — is that not a joy?" — Confucius
"Do not do to others what you would not want done to you." — Confucius
"The noble person is open and at ease; the petty person is anxious and fretful." — Confucius
"Those who know are not equal to those who love; those who love are not equal to those who delight in it." — Confucius
"Review the old and learn the new — then one may be a teacher." — Confucius
"Quick to learn and unashamed to ask those below you." — Confucius
"When you see the worthy, strive to equal them; when you see the unworthy, turn inward and examine yourself." — Confucius
"It passes on like this, never ceasing day or night." — Confucius
"Your view of time shapes your life."
"Today is the youngest day of the rest of your life."
"Do not wait for the perfect moment — start now."
"Action is the antidote to fear."
"Doing beats a perfect plan."
"Done is better than perfect."
"Start first, then improve."
"Small actions bring big change."
"Improve 1% each day and you will be 37 times better in a year."
"The power of habit exceeds imagination."
"Good habits are an investment in your future."
"Your daily routine determines your future."
"Tiny habits, big change."
"Consistency matters more than intensity."
"Perseverance is the key."
"Your discipline gives you freedom."
"Delayed gratification is key to success."
"Patience is a superpower."
"Waiting is also a form of action."
"Trust the power of time."
"I think, therefore I am." — René Descartes
"Knowledge is power." — Francis Bacon
"Read ten thousand books and travel ten thousand miles." — Dong Qichang
"Excellence comes from diligence; idleness leads to ruin." — Han Yu
"Action succeeds through thought; failure follows recklessness." — Han Yu
"Diligence is the path up the mountain of books; effort is the boat on the boundless sea of learning." — Han Yu
"Fallen blossoms are not heartless — they nourish spring soil to protect new flowers." — Gong Zizhen
"Each age brings forth its talents, each leading their era for centuries." — Zhao Yi
"Through countless blows it stands firm, whatever wind blows from any direction." — Zheng Banqiao
"Though we are humble county officials, every branch and leaf touches our hearts." — Zheng Banqiao
"You are a strong learner."
"Mistakes are part of learning."
"Failure is feedback, not the finish line."
"Learn from your mistakes."
"Every failure brings you closer to success."
"Your resilience is admirable."
"There is beauty in rising after a fall."
"Setbacks are nourishment for growth."
"Your experiences have shaped your wisdom."
"Pain will pass; wisdom will remain."
"Your scars are your medals."
"Having known darkness, you understand light more deeply."
"Your story can inspire others."
"Share your experience to help others."
"Your pain was not in vain."
"Transform pain into strength."
"Your resilience is an example to others."
"You are stronger than your difficulties."
"There is no obstacle you cannot overcome."
"This too shall pass."
"Life is like riding a bicycle — to keep your balance you must keep moving." — Albert Einstein
"Imagination is more important than knowledge." — Albert Einstein
"Try not to become a person of success, but rather try to become a person of value." — Albert Einstein
"Logic will get you from A to B. Imagination will take you everywhere." — Albert Einstein
"In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity." — Albert Einstein
"Life is like a box of chocolates — you never know what you're gonna get." — Forrest Gump
"Stupid is as stupid does." — Forrest Gump
"Miracles happen every day."
"Believe in miracles — you are one."
"Your potential is limitless."
"Do not limit yourself."
"There are more possibilities than you imagine."
"Keep an open mind."
"New experiences bring new growth."
"Try new things."
"Step outside your comfort zone."
"Growth happens outside your comfort zone."
"Adventure is worth it."
"Courage is not the absence of fear, but moving forward despite it."
"Your bravery is admirable."
"Every attempt is a victory."
"You deserve to be proud of yourself."
"Celebrate every achievement."
"Small wins deserve celebration too."
"Your progress is visible."
"Acknowledge your own effort."
"You are your own best cheerleader."
"Cheer yourself on."
"You are creating something beautiful."
"The future holds promise."
"All human suffering is, at bottom, anger at one's own inadequacy." — Wang Xiaobo
"Life is a process of being slowly hammered into shape." — Wang Xiaobo
"A person needs not only this life but also a poetic world." — Wang Xiaobo
"That day I was twenty-one, in the golden age of my life." — Wang Xiaobo
"I want to love, to eat, and in an instant to become a half-lit cloud in the sky." — Wang Xiaobo
"We bear many responsibilities in life, but do not forget a little responsibility to yourself." — Wang Xiaobo
"Happiness is not having more, but wanting less."
"Contentment brings lasting joy."
"Be grateful for what you have."
"Find three things to be grateful for each day."
"A grateful heart leads to a happy life."
"Your gratitude list will keep growing."
"Focus on what you have, not what you lack."
"Abundance is a mindset."
"You already have enough."
"The present moment is the most precious."
"This moment is all you truly have."
"Live mindfully; feel the present."
"Breathe — right here, right now."
"Your breath is your best anchor."
"Return to the present; return to your breath."
"You, right now, are already enough."
"You need nothing more — you are whole in this moment."
"Peace is within you."
"You have endless resources within."
"Look inward for answers."
"Your intuition is worth trusting."
"Listen to your inner voice."
"You know what is best for you."
"Trust your inner wisdom."
"The real voyage of discovery consists not in seeking new landscapes, but in having new eyes." — Marcel Proust
"Life is short, art is long." — Hippocrates
"Know thyself." — Socrates
"The unexamined life is not worth living." — Socrates
"I know that I know nothing." — Socrates
"Virtue is knowledge." — Socrates
"Man is the measure of all things." — Protagoras
"I think, therefore I am." — René Descartes
"Existence precedes essence." — Jean-Paul Sartre
"Hell is other people." — Jean-Paul Sartre
"Your choices define you."
"You have the freedom to choose."
"Even within limits, you still have room to choose."
"Choose your attitude."
"Attitude is everything."
"Your perspective creates your reality."
"Look at the problem from another angle."
"Reframe your narrative."
"You are the author of your own story."
"Rewrite your story."
"The past does not define you."
"You can start again."
"Every day is a new chapter."
"Your story is yours to write."
"Create the life you want."
"You are the architect of your life."
"Design your life."
"Live with intention."
"Live out your intentions."
"Your life has purpose."
"Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts." — Winston Churchill
"Never give in, never give in, never give in." — Winston Churchill
"A pessimist sees difficulty in every opportunity; an optimist sees opportunity in every difficulty." — Winston Churchill
"We make a living by what we get, but we make a life by what we give." — Winston Churchill
"Success is going from failure to failure without loss of enthusiasm." — Winston Churchill
"Your passion is your compass."
"Follow your passion."
"Do what you love."
"Love what you do."
"Passion drives excellence."
"Your passion inspires others."
"Stay curious."
"Never stop learning."
"Growth is a lifelong journey."
"You are always a student."
"Stay humble."
"Humility takes you further."
"An open mind brings new possibilities."
"Be willing to be changed."
"Flexibility is strength."
"Adapt to change."
"Change is the only constant."
"Embrace change."
"Find opportunity in change."
"Change brings growth."
"Life is each moment dancing—look back and wonder: I'm already here?" — The Courage to Be Disliked
"Dream the dreams you never dared to dream; become what you never dared to become." — Oprah Winfrey
"Be the best version of yourself — no one can do that better than you." — Oprah Winfrey
"Turn your wounds into wisdom." — Oprah Winfrey
"Your life is what you make it." — Oprah Winfrey
"Believe in yourself and create your own miracle."
"Miracles begin with belief."
"Believing is the first step to seeing."
"Your beliefs create your reality."
"Hold on to your faith."
"Hope lives in the heart."
"Hope is a source of strength."
"Never lose hope."
"The light of hope never goes out."
"Your hope inspires others."
"Pass on hope."
"You are a light for others."
"Light the way for others."
"Your kindness changes the world."
"Kindness is a choice."
